editionStmt.p: Digitized by the Ethiopic Manuscript Imaging Project directed by Steve Delamarter.

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: Data on leaves dimensions taken from fol. 27r.

supportDesc.foliation:
Foliation the upper right corner, in pencil on fols 1r–5r, , then with a pen beginning on the first page containing text. On 39r, (not counted by Dillmann) is written under the folio number. On all subsequent folia, Christian Friedrich August Dillmann's numeration is indicated in brackets under the folio number. References in this record are given to the second foliation, counting the blank leaf 39.
Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivéOriens ChristianusAnaisWion200993135-171http://www.academia.edu/3022230/Le_Liber_Aksumae_selon_le_manuscrit_Bodleian_Bruce_93_le_plus_ancien_t%C3%A9moin_dun_projet_historiographique_sans_cesse_r%C3%A9activ%C3%A9bm:Wion2009LibAksbm:Wion2009LibAks13810

item.note: This quire was added later to the manuscript. Fols. 2, has been misplaced from its proper position after 3. Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivéOriens ChristianusAnaisWion200993135-171http://www.academia.edu/3022230/Le_Liber_Aksumae_selon_le_manuscrit_Bodleian_Bruce_93_le_plus_ancien_t%C3%A9moin_dun_projet_historiographique_sans_cesse_r%C3%A9activ%C3%A9bm:Wion2009LibAksbm:Wion2009LibAks141 <hi rend="italics">Rǝstä Amba zä-Ǝsraʾel</hi>: Ein Dokument über Erbbesitz des äthiopischen Königshauses (<hi rend="italics">Ǝsraʾel</hi>) auf und um Amba-Säl aus dem 16. JahrhundertStudies in Ethiopian Languages, Literature, and History, Presented to Getatchew Haile by his Friends and ColleaguesAethiopistische ForschungenManfredKroppAdamMcCollumWiesbadenHarrassowitz2017Aethiopistische Forschungen83345-37783bm:Kropp2017Erbbesitzbm:Kropp2017Erbbesitz346

list.item: 11 Fols 21r–31v 2, stub after 10 5, stub after 7 8, stub after 5

item.desc: Every leaf of the manuscript is stamped with the stamp of the Bodleian Library.
Note written on the fly-leaf:
item.q: This volume contains 3 blank pages of paper at beginning + 4 unnumbered vellum leaves + 38 leaves consecutively numbered + 1 blank vellum leaf (39) not counted by Dillmann + 60 vellum leaves numbered consecutively 40-99 but counted by Dillmann as 39-98 + 2 blank vellum leaves + three blank pages of paper at end. E. B. N. 30.9.1889

binding.decoNote:
European binding; leather covering with gold leaf. The inner cover is reinforced with gilded decorative paper with a floral pattern. The French title is imprinted on the spine by James Bruce with golden letters:Histoir d'Abissi. Tom II. One paper fly leaf each, containing watermarks, at the front and back. The text block has been trimmed and its edges were gilded.
Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivéOriens ChristianusAnaisWion200993135-171http://www.academia.edu/3022230/Le_Liber_Aksumae_selon_le_manuscrit_Bodleian_Bruce_93_le_plus_ancien_t%C3%A9moin_dun_projet_historiographique_sans_cesse_r%C3%A9activ%C3%A9bm:Wion2009LibAksbm:Wion2009LibAks13810
A bookmark of blue textile, very probably European, is attached to the headband.

history.provenance: was copied for James Bruce, but the rest of the manuscript which was produced between and , was given to James Bruce by ʾAmmǝḫā ʾIyasus. Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivéOriens ChristianusAnaisWion200993135-171http://www.academia.edu/3022230/Le_Liber_Aksumae_selon_le_manuscrit_Bodleian_Bruce_93_le_plus_ancien_t%C3%A9moin_dun_projet_historiographique_sans_cesse_r%C3%A9activ%C3%A9bm:Wion2009LibAksbm:Wion2009LibAks140-141 <hi rend="italics">Rǝstä Amba zä-Ǝsraʾel</hi>: Ein Dokument über Erbbesitz des äthiopischen Königshauses (<hi rend="italics">Ǝsraʾel</hi>) auf und um Amba-Säl aus dem 16. JahrhundertStudies in Ethiopian Languages, Literature, and History, Presented to Getatchew Haile by his Friends and ColleaguesAethiopistische ForschungenManfredKroppAdamMcCollumWiesbadenHarrassowitz2017Aethiopistische Forschungen83345-37783bm:Kropp2017Erbbesitzbm:Kropp2017Erbbesitz349 Chronicle of King Gälawdewos (1540-1559): Critical Edition and Annotated TranslationSolomon Gebreyes BeyeneHamburg2016http://ediss.sub.uni-hamburg.de/volltexte/2016/8117/pdf/Dissertation.pdfPhD DissertationHistoriographyAdWGalawdewosChroniclebm:Solomon2016GalawdewosHistoriographyAdWGalawdewosChroniclebm:Solomon2016Galawdewos61

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices Aethiopici
Zekra Nagar. Die universalhistorische Einleitung nach Giyorgis Walda-Amid in der Chronikensammlung des Haylu
Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivé
Oriens Christianus
<hi rend="italics">Rǝstä Amba zä-Ǝsraʾel</hi>: Ein Dokument über Erbbesitz des äthiopischen Königshauses (<hi rend="italics">Ǝsraʾel</hi>) auf und um Amba-Säl aus dem 16. Jahrhundert
Studies in Ethiopian Languages, Literature, and History, Presented to Getatchew Haile by his Friends and Colleagues
Aethiopistische Forschungen
Un cas de censure politique au XVIIe siècle: la chronique de Śarṣa-Dǝngǝl
Annales d’Éthiopie

msItem.title: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ዜና፡ ልደቶሙ፡ ለአበው፡ እምአዳም፡ እስከ፡ ይእዜ፡
Tārika Walda ʿAmid
msItem.note: Excerpts from Tārika Walda ʿAmid and a chronology of the Ethiopian kings.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 4r.

handNote.seg: Written by several hands, see <hi rend="italics">Rǝstä Amba zä-Ǝsraʾel</hi>: Ein Dokument über Erbbesitz des äthiopischen Königshauses (<hi rend="italics">Ǝsraʾel</hi>) auf und um Amba-Säl aus dem 16. JahrhundertStudies in Ethiopian Languages, Literature, and History, Presented to Getatchew Haile by his Friends and ColleaguesAethiopistische ForschungenManfredKroppAdamMcCollumWiesbadenHarrassowitz2017Aethiopistische Forschungen83345-37783bm:Kropp2017Erbbesitzbm:Kropp2017Erbbesitz346.

item.desc: Note with pen in the upper margin.
Note with pencil in the upper margin.
Note with pen in the upper margin.
European glosses written in pencil in the margins, containing the names of persons mentioned in the respective section of the text.
Pen trial or scribble in the lower margin.

history.provenance: This part of the manuscript was copied for James Bruce.

msItem.title: Chronicle of ʿAmda Ṣǝyon
msItem.incipit: Fol. 5ra በስመ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ኃይለ፡ ወመዊአ፡ ዘገብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በእደዊሁ፡ ለዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡ ንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵያ። ወስመ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ገብረ፡ መስቀል። በዐሠርቱ፡ ወሰመንቱ፡ ዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ እምዘ፡ ነግሠ፡ ወዓመተ፡ ምሕረትሂ፡ ፭፻፲ወ፮፡
msItem.explicit: Excerpt of the supplication: fol. 15vbእግዚአብሔር፡ የሀቦ፡ ህየንተ፡ ዘበምድር፡ ዘበሰማያት፨ ወያኑሕ፡ መዋዕሊሁ፡ ዲበ፡ ምድር፡ ወያድኅኖ፡ እሞት፡ ዘግብት፡ ወያውርሶ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ምስለ፡ ኄራን፡ ነገሥት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡

bibl.title: Der siegreiche Feldzug des Königs ʿĀmda-Ṣeyon gegen die Muslime in Adal im Jahre 1332 n. Chr.
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
Der siegreiche Feldzug des Königs ʿĀmda-Ṣeyon gegen die Muslime in Adal im Jahre 1332 n. Chr.
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium

msItem.title: History of the Kings of Ethiopia from Zarʾa Yāʿqob to Nāʿod, written at the time of Lǝbna Dǝngǝl.
Chronicle of Zarʾa Yāʿqob
msItem.incipit: Fol. 16ra በስመ፡ እወጥን፡ አንሰ፡ ከመ፡ እንብብ፡ ወእከርትስ፡ ኵሉ፡ ሥርዓታቲሁ፡ ለእግዚእነ፡ ወመሲሕነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ ቈስጠንጢኖስ፡ ወልደ፡ ማርያም፡ ክቡር፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ይረስዮ፡ ጽድቆ፡ ወመንግሥቶ፡ ከመ፡ ይትዋረስ፡ በከመ፡ ሕሊናሁ፡ ይፈቅድ፡ ወየኀሥሥ፡ ወይሡጥ፡ ካዕበተ፡ ጸጋሁ፡ ላዕለ፡ ወልዱ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ ሐዲስ፡ ለረኪበ፡ ፍድፋድ፡ ዕቢይ፡ ወሞገስ። በከመ፡ ተሠውጠ፡ ካዕበተ፡ መንፈሱ፡ ለኤልያስ፡ ላዕለ፡ ኤልሳዕ፡ ረድኡ፡ ጊዜ፡ ዓርገ፡ ላዕለ፡ በአፍራሰ፡ መንፈስ። ወያኑኅ፡ መዋዕሊሁ፡ እስከ፡ ኅልፈተ፡ ሰማይ፡ ወየብስ፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን።
msItem.note: The entirety of Zarʾa Yāʿqob's reign, 35 years, is covered by the chronicle.
Prayers for Lǝbna Dǝngǝl, similar to those in the incipit, are included at the end of the work.

msItem.title: Chronicle of Baʾǝda Māryām
msItem.incipit: Fol. 23ra ወእምድኅረ፡ አዕረፈ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ነግሠ፡ ወልዱ፡ በእደ፡ ማርያም፡
msItem.note: The entirety of Baʾǝda Māryām I's reign is covered. Prayers for Lǝbna Dǝngǝl similar to those in are included at the end.

msItem.title: Chronicle of ʾƎskǝndǝr
msItem.note: A few passages on the reign of ʿAmda Ṣǝyon II are joined to the Chronicle of ʾƎskǝndǝr.
Prayers for Lǝbna Dǝngǝl are included at the end.

bibl.title: Histoire d'Eskender, dʾ'Amda-Ṣeyon II et de Nâʾod, rois dʾÉthiopie. Texte éthiopien inédit comprenant en outre un fragment de la chronique de Baʾeda-Mâryâm, leur prédécesseur et traduction
Journal Asiatique

msItem.title: Chronicle of Nāʿod
msItem.incipit: Fol. 30rb ወእምዝ፡ ነግሠ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ናኦድ፡ ወልደ፡ በእደ፡ ማርያም፡ እኁሁ፡ ለእስክንድር፡
msItem.note: The account is very short; there is no subscription.

bibl.title: Histoire d'Eskender, dʾ'Amda-Ṣeyon II et de Nâʾod, rois dʾÉthiopie. Texte éthiopien inédit comprenant en outre un fragment de la chronique de Baʾeda-Mâryâm, leur prédécesseur et traduction
Journal Asiatique

msItem.title: Śǝrʿāta mangǝśt (general record)
ሥርዓተ፡ ግብር፡ ዘቋሞች፡ ወዘዕለት፡ ማእድ፡
Sitting and eating order of the dignitaries
msItem.note: The individual sections composing this part have no titles.

msItem.title: ወግዕ፡ ዘመንግሥት፡ ቤት፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡
msItem.note: Accurate enumeration of the storage places and tents in which the King's treasures are kept and the servants guarding them.

msItem.title: On the royal camps
ወግዕ፡ ዘበቍሎ፡ ቤት፡ ዘሠርዑ፡ ሐፄ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን፡
ዘወፅኡ፡ እምግብጽ፡ ምስለ፡ እብነ፡ እልሐኪም፡ እብነ፡ እልሀኪም፡ ብሂል፡ ወልደ፡ ጠቢብ፡ ብሂል፡ እሉ፡ እሙንቱ፡
Sǝma ʾahgurāt
Amharic Royal Songs (generic record)
በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወውልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ትጽሕፈ፡ ርስተ፡ አምባ፡ ዘእስራኤል፡ በከመ፡ ኮነ፡ በበ፡ ገጹ፡ ወበበ፡ ዘመኑ፡
msItem.note: Description of the inheritance of the Ethiopian kings.

msItem.title: History of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl and his predecessors
msItem.incipit: Fol. 39ra በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ዘአምጽአ፡ ዓለም፡ እምኀበ፡ ኢሀልዎ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀልዎ፠ ንወጥን፡ ጸሒፈ፡ ዜና፡ አዝማናት፡ ዘኮነ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ነገሥት፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፠ ወአስማቲሆሙ፡ ናየዕድ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዝንቱ ፨
msItem.explicit: Fol. 40rbወከመዝ፡ ገብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወአቅደመ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ሕግ፡ ሥጋዊ፨ ወአስተዳኅረ፡ ሰቢከ፡ ወንጌል፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ሕግ፡ መንፈሳዊ፠ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ መጋቤ፡ ብሉይ፡ ወሓዲስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ወአኰቴት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ ኣሜን፨

bibl.title: Storia di Lebna Dengel re d'Etiopia sino alle prime lotte contro Ahmad Ben Ibrahim
Atti della Reale Accademia dei Lincei, Rendiconti, Classe di scienze morale, storiche e filologiche
Die Geschichte des Lebna-Dengel, Claudius und Minās
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium

msItem.title: Introduction to the History of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl and his predecessors
msItem.incipit: Fol. 40ra በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ፈጣሪ፡ ዘአምጽአ፡ ዓለም፡ እምኀበ፡ ኢሀልዎ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀልዎ፠ ንወጥን፡ ጸሒፈ፡ ዜና፡ አዝማናት፡ ዘኮነ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ነገሥት፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፠ ወአስማቲሆሙ ናየዕድ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ዝንቱ ፨
msItem.explicit: Fol. 40rbወከመዝ፡ ገብረ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወአቅደመ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ኦሪት፡ ዘውእቱ፡ሕግ፡ ሥጋዊ፨ ወአስተዳኅረ፡ ሰቢከ፡ ወንጌል፡ ዘውእቱ፡ ሕግ፡ መንፈሳዊ፠ ለእግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ መጋቤ፡ ብሉይ፡ ወሓዲስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ ወአኰቴት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ ኣሜን፨

msItem.title: ክፍል፡ ቀዳማዊ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ ጻድቅ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ መፍቀሬ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ርቱዐ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ላዕሌሁ፡ ሰላም፨
msItem.incipit: Fol. 40rbወምክንያቱሰ፡ ዘኀደግነ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜና፡ ነገሥታት፡ እለ፡ ቀደሙ፡
msItem.explicit:
Fol. 41vbወተቀብረ፡ ውስተ፡ ምኔተ፡ ኣባ፡ ኣረጋዊ፡ ዘትሰመይ፡ ደብረ፡ ዳሞ፡ ፨ እግዚአብሔር፡ ያዕረፍ፡ ነፍሶ፡ ውስተ፡ ሕፅነ፡ አብርሃም፡ ይስሓቅ፡ ወያዕቆብ፨ ጸሎቱ፡ ወበረከቱ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ ጻድቅ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፠ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ወልዱ፡ ንጉሥነ፡
ሱስንዮስ፠ በዓለ፡ ራብዓይ፡ ክፍል፡ ዘንሕነ፡ ጽሁቃን፡ ለከሢተ፡ ትሩፋቲሁ፨ ወለነሂ፡ ትትኖለወነ፡ ሀብተ፡ ረድኤቱ፡ መንፈሳዊት፡ ወትመግበነ፡ ሥነ፡ ጽድቁ፡ ወንጌላዊት፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ ኣሜን፨

msItem.title: ክፍል፡ ዳግማዊ፡ ዘንከሥት፡ ቦቱ፡ ዜና፡ መዊኦቱ፡ ወትሩፋተ፡ ኂሩቱ፡ በአኅፅሮ፡ አኮ፡ በአንሖ፡ አኮ፡ በአፈድፍ ዶ፡ አላ፡ በአውሕዶ፡ ለንጉሥነ፡ መፍቀሬ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ወመፍቀሬ፡ ሰብእ፡ በጸጋ፡ አሐቲ፡ ጥምቀት፡ ዘተሰምየ፡ ገላውዴዎስ፡ ላዕሌሁ፡ ሰላም፡

msItem.title: ንጽሕፍ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ ሠርፀ፡ ድንግል፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ያኑኅ፡ መዋዕሊሁ፡ ከመ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ዕፀ፡ ሕይወት፡ ወይዕቀቦ፡ እመከራ፡ አዝማናት፡
msItem.explicit: Fols 87ra–87rb ተፈጸመ፡ ዜና፡ አይሁድ፡ በ፸፡ ፻፡ ፸፡ ፫፡ ዓመት፡ እምዓመተ፡ ዓለም፡ በ፲፻ወ፰፻፺ወ፰ ዓመት፡ እምዓመተ፡ እስክንድር፡ ዘ፪ አቅርንቲሁ፡ በ፲፻ወ፭፻፸ወ፫ ዓመት፡ እምትስጉተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሐት፡ በ፲፻ወ፪፻፺ወ፯ ዓመት፡ እምዓመተ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ በ፲ወ፰፡ ዓመት፡ እምዓመተ፡ መንግሥቱ፡ ለንጉሥ፡ መለክ፡ ሰገድ፡ ኃይል፡ ወጽኑዕ፡ መዋኢ፡ በውስተ፡ ፀብእ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ያጽንዕ፡ መዋዕሊሁ፡ ከመ፡ መዋዕለ፡ ፪ ዕፅው፡ ዘይት፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን ፧ ይቤ፡ በዐለ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ኦኣኃውየ፡ ማእምራን፡ አንባብያኒሁ፡ ወሰማዕያኒሁ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ እመ፡ ረከብክሙ፡ ብየ፡ ስሕተተ፡ በኃዲገ፡ ዜና፡ እመንገለ፡ ዝንጋዔ፡ ወኢያእምሮ፡ ኅደጉ፡ ሊተ፡ አበሳየ፡ ተዘኪረክሙ፡ ከመኅፁፅ፡ ውእቱ፡ አእምሮተ፡ እጓለ፡ እመሕያው፡ ወአኮ፡ ምሉእ ፨ ተውሰከሰ፡ ኢወሰኩ፡ በእንተ፡ ስብሓተ፡ ፅሩዕ፨ አላ፡ ጸሓፍኩ፡ ዘሰማዕኩ፡ ወዘርኢኩ፨ በእንተዝ፡ በሉ፡ ይምሓሮ፡ ወይሠሃሎ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ አሜን ፨
Fol. 99vc ተወጥነ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ በትእዛዘ፡ መለክ፡ ሰገድ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወተፈጸመ፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘሎቱ፡ ክሂል፡ ላዕለ፡ ኵሉ፡ ግብር፡ ወቦቱ፡ ይከውን፡ ፍጻሜ፡ ኵሉ፡ ነገር። ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወላዕሌነ፡ ይኩን፡ ምሕረት፡

bibl.title: Historia regis Sarṣa Dengel (Malak Sagad). Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 27r.
layout.ab: Ruling is visible, pricking seems to have been cut off when the text block was trimmed.

handNote.seg: Very small characters, carefully executed. See for a description Der siegreiche Feldzug des Königs ʿĀmda-Ṣeyon gegen die Muslime in Adal im Jahre 1332 n. Chr.Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum OrientaliumManfredKroppLouvainPeeters1994Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium538, Scriptores Aethiopici, 99538, Scriptores Aethiopici, 99bm:Kropp1994AmdaSeyonbm:Kropp1994AmdaSeyonxviii–xix

item.desc: The name of a scribe, Walda Hāymānot, is written in the lower margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title written in red, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, partly visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.

Running title visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Remainder of a running title, which was cut off when the volume was trimmed in Europe, visible in the upper margin.
Cue for the rubricator visible.
Cues for the rubricator visible.
Cue for the rubricator visible.
Cue for the rubricator visible.
Cues for the rubricator visible.
Cues for the rubricator visible.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Note written in the margin.
Written in pencil in the upper margin
Occasional European notes, giving the name or year of an event occurring in the respective text section, are written in the margins throughout.
The names of Emperors are given in a European language in the upper margin on the page of the beginning of their chronicle.
Occasional small crosses written in black ink in the margins.
Occasional small dashes written in blue ink in the margins.

origin.note: Kropp argues that was written in the time of King Susǝnyos most probably after 1610 because Chronicle of Śarḍa Dǝngǝl is presented in the so-called "censored version"

msItem.title: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወውልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ትጽሕፈ፡ ርስተ፡ አምባ፡ ዘእስራኤል፡ በከመ፡ ኮነ፡ በበ፡ ገጹ፡ ወበበ፡ ዘመኑ፡
msItem.note: Description of the inheritance of the Ethiopian kings.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 38r.
layout.ab: Ruling is visible, pricking has been partly cut off.

origin.note: Neither Kropp nor Marrassini consider a different dating for

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Updated with codicological information (foliation, collation, dimensions layout, condition, binding) during consultation of the manuscript.

t:div.t:ab: ንጽሕፍ፡ መቅድመ፡ ዜና፡ አበዊሁ፡ ነገሥት፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ወአስተዳኅርነ፡ ኪያሁ፡ ከመ፡ ይኩን፡ ኀበ፡ ዘየዓቢ፡ መዓርግ፡ እምዘ፡ ይቴሐት፡

ይቤ፡ በዓለ፡ ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ኦአኃው፡ ማእምራን፡ እለ፡ ታነብብዎ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ኢትትዐቀፉ፡ ቦቱ። እምኒ፡ ኢያሠነየ፡ ንባበ፡ ወኢያሠርገወ፡ ቃለ፡ አልቦቱ፡ ነውረ፡ እስመ፡ ውእቱ፡ ተናገረ፡ አምጣነ፡ ክሂሎቱ፡ በከመ፡ አንበቦ፡ መንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አኮ፡ ዘጸሐፈ፡ ዘንተ፡ በኃሢሠ፡ ውዳሴ፡ ብጡል፡ ወበኃሢሠ፡ ክብር፡ ምድራዊ። አላ፡ ከመ፡ ይፈጽም፡ ትእዛዙ፡ እግዚኡ። እስመ፡ ይቤ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ አግብርትኒ፡ ተአዘዙ፡ ለአጋእዝቲክሙ። እንከሰ፡ ኦማእምራን፡ ኢታንክሩ፡ ስሕተተ፡ ዝንቱ፡ ተአዛዚ፡ ተዘኪረክሙ፡ ቃለ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ዘይቤ፡ ለስሒት፡ መኑ፡ ይሌብዋ። ኀተምነ፡ ነገረ፡ በዝንቱ፡ ቃል።
